Create file governance/validators/validate_pass_sources.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path

def main() -> int:
    path = Path("governance/state/KZ7_CODEX_STATUS_LOOP_CLEANUP_POLICY.json")
    data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    policy = data.get("policy", {})
    if policy.get("codex_logs_are_proof") is not False:
        raise SystemExit("codex logs must not be proof")
    if "validated receipts" not in policy.get("release_pass_sources", []):
        raise SystemExit("validated receipts source missing")
    print(json.dumps({"status":"ok","release_pass":False,"codex_logs_are_proof":False}, ensure_ascii=False))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
